examples.title: Converting Expanded Form to Standard Form
examples.content:
Write the standard form of: $7,000 + 800 + 60 + 3$

**Solution:**
Add all the place values together:
$$7,000 + 800 + 60 + 3 = 7,863$$

The standard form is **7,863**.

examples.title: Standard Form with Zeros as Placeholders
examples.content:
What is the standard form of: $9,000 + 0 + 30 + 2$? (Note the missing hundreds place)

**Solution:**
Write the digits in their correct positions:
- 9 in the thousands place
- 0 in the hundreds place
- 3 in the tens place
- 2 in the ones place

Standard form: **9,032**
